channel.title: POP:CORN Journal Club
channel.description: Weekly paper discussion at the Ross-Ibarra Lab, UC Davis

item.title: Huang et al 2026 — Teosinte alleles enhance nitrogen assimilation and seed protein in maize
Rees et al preprint — Joint dog and wolf genealogies reveal the evolution of the canine genome
Brielle et al preprint — Buried in two places: Lineages from elite Maya tombs also found in distant caves
Piovesan et al 2026 — Ancient oaks reveal rewilding of Mediterranean forests after the Black Death
Mattila et al preprint — Population genomic processes in Brassicaceae in the light of mating system variation
Zhang et al 2025 — Transposon proliferation drives genome architecture and regulatory evolution in wild and domesticated peppers
Madrigal-Roca et al preprint — The dynamics of "silent" variation in Mimulus guttatus: Codon usage bias and linked selection
Wang et al preprint — The dynamics of introgression across an adaptive radiation: examining hybrid speciation and parallel adaptation in North American Vitis
Pineau et al 2026 — Genomic ancestry predicts rapid responses to drought across spatiotemporal scales
Presgraves et al 2026 — The evolutionary genomics of meiotic drive
McFarlane et al 2026 — Selection leads to remarkable variability in the outcomes of hybridisation across replicate hybrid zones
Gaut et al 2026 — What has population genomics told us about the dynamics of selection and plant adaptation?
Mualim et al 2026 — Large future genetic diversity losses are predicted from conservation indicators even with habitat protection
Yue et al. 2026 — Maize cultivation and forest collapse over five centuries in southern China
Somerville et al 2026 — Multi-isotope analysis of mammal bones provides environmental context for the adoption of agriculture in the Tehuacan Valley of Mexico
Zhang et al. preprint — Recovering signatures of archaic introgression using ancestral recombination graphs
Morris et al 2026 — A sorghum pangenome reference improves global crop trait discovery

Simons et al 2025 — Simple scaling laws control the genetic architectures of human complex traits
Tianlin et al preprint — The genetic architecture of local adaptation is historically contingent
James and Lascoux preprint — The effect of genome organisation on selection efficiency in two contrasted plant species

Baril, Pucetti, and Croll — Historic transposon mobilisation waves create distinct pools of adaptive variants in a major crop pathogen
Braasch, Harenčár, Swope preprint — Extremely fine-scale soil heterogeneity in a rare serpentine endemic plant shapes patterns of genetic diversity
Spence et al 2025 — Specificity, length and luck drive gene rankings in association studies
Grundler et al 2025 — A geographic history of human genetic ancestry
Lopez et al 2025 — Museum Genomics Reveals Temporal Genetic Stasis and Global Genetic Diversity in Arabidopsis thaliana
Slalov et al 2025 — Population structure limits the use of genomic data for predicting phenotypes and managing genetic resources in forest trees
Mead et al preprint — Variation in responses to temperature across admixed genotypes of Populus trichocarpa × P.

Roberts et al 2025 — K-mer-based Approaches to Bridging Pangenomics and Population Genetics
Piri et al preprint — Higher order repeat structures reflect diverging evolutionary paths in maize centromeres and knobs
Anderson et al 2025 — Adaptation and gene flow are insufficient to rescue a montane plant under climate change
Manin et al 2025 — Ancient dog mitogenomes support the dual dispersal of dogs and agriculture into South America

Macharia et al 2025 — Cowpea (Vigna unguiculata L. Walp.) landraces in Mozambique and neighbouring Southern African countries harbour genetic loci with potential for climate adaptation
Jing et al 2025 — Maximizing meiotic crossover rates reveals the map of Crossover Potential
Wang et al 2025 — DNA gains and losses in gigantic genomes do not track differences in transposable element-host silencing interactions

Sakamoto and Yeaman preprint — Maintenance of polymorphism in spatially heterogeneous
Jiang et al 2025 — Incorporating genetic load contributes to predicting Arabidopsis thaliana’s response to climate change
Schneemann and Welch preprint — Predicting hybrid fitness: the effects of ploidy and complex ancestry
Kistler et al 2025 — Historic manioc genomes illuminate maintenance of diversity under long-lived clonal cultivation

Frayer et al 2024 — Do genetic loci that cause reproductive isolation in the lab inhibit gene flow in nature?
